export class InventoryStore{static setItems(items){this._items=items;this._listeners.forEach(cb=>cb(this._items));}static getItems(){return this._items;}/** subscribe; returns an unsubscribe function */static onUpdate(callback){this._listeners.add(callback);// push current state immediately so UI mounts with data
callback(this._items);return()=>this._listeners.delete(callback);}static clearListeners(){this._listeners.clear();}}InventoryStore._items=[];InventoryStore._listeners=new Set();
